#1 Software for
Law Firms

Odoo allows you to create a dedicated website, book appointments, manage cases, and store and sign documents safely. Combined with powerful timesheets and invoicing, it's the best solution for your law firm.

Start now
Meet an advisor
  • Micro Business (1-5 employees)
  • Small Business (6-50 employees)
  • Midsized company (51-250 employees)
  • Micro entreprise (1-5 employés) - Français
  • Petite entreprise (6-50 employés) - Français
  • Empresas Pequeñas (<50 empleados) - Español
  • Large company (250+ employees)

Odoo is a system that helps us in every single aspect of our work, starting from accounts to CRM, operations, and HR. It made the communication between employees much easier, as well as between us and the clients.

Lina Khudairi
COO of RAALC Law Firm

Website ready for appointment booking

Create a stunning website using Odoo's AI-based builder, 3+ million free photos, and drag-and-drop elements. No coding skills required.

Use page templates to create content such as “About us” page, contact forms, blog posts, and more.

Showcase different appointment types on your website and allow clients to book consultations online. Everything is synchronized with your calendar for seamless planning.

Centralized case management

Once you sell your services, Odoo automatically creates projects and tasks for each case.

Everything is centralized in an all-in-one dashboard. Use tags, statuses, color-coding, and activities to never miss a follow-up.

Your project's top bar contains all records related to a case: timesheets, sales orders, invoices, and more.

Dedicated document workspace

Each case gets its own document workspace, where you can easily store, organize, and manage documents in a secure way.

Odoo's eSign ensures that you can provide legally binding signatures online - all it takes is a click.

Find out more about eSign

Streamlined finances

Invoice clients based on fixed rates, timesheets, or milestones. Accept upfront or down payments; Odoo adapts to your unique business needs.

A professional invoice is created and sent to the customer in a flash - no extra work needed.

Odoo's integrated timesheets allow for easy time tracking from a project task or a dedicated app, on laptops or mobile devices - the choice is yours.

But wait! There's more!

All the features
done right.

Integrated sales

From receiving a lead, through quotation and sale, to invoicing - the entire process in automated with minimal manual input.

Website builder

Build a stunning website and enjoy 1 year of free domain with Odoo.

CRM pipeline

Your leads are centralized in one, easy-to-use dashboard.

Flexible invoicing

Create customized invoices based on timesheets, fixed prices, milestones, and more.

Planning Gantt charts

Streamline resource planning for your cases.

Project dashboard

Manage all details related to each case, including time spent and cost analysis.

One need, one app.

Expand as you grow.

Odoo is a suite of open source business apps that cover all your company needs: CRM, eCommerce, accounting, inventory, point of sale, project management, etc.

Odoo's unique value proposition is to be at the same time very easy to use and fully integrated.
